message:
test(conformance): update fftshift fixture for ND array support

Change fftshift_requires_1d_error to fftshift_2d_square_golden:
- Previously expected error for 2D input
- Now expects successful shift on all axes
- Expected output [4,3,2,1] matches NumPy fftshift([[1,2],[3,4]])

Follows f21c72f feat(ufunc): extend fftshift/ifftshift to ND arrays

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -327,7 +327,7 @@
     "expected_error_contains": "ifft: input must have shape [n, 2]"
   },
   {
-    "id": "fftshift_requires_1d_error",
+    "id": "fftshift_2d_square_golden",
     "operation": "fftshift",
     "seed": 8815,
     "mode": "hardened",
@@ -336,11 +336,14 @@
       "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/fft_differential_cases.json",
       "crates/fnp-ufunc/src/lib.rs"
     ],
-    "reason_code": "fft_differential_expected_error",
-    "expected_reason_code": "ufunc_operation_error",
+    "reason_code": "fft_differential_expected_success",
+    "expected_reason_code": "fft_differential_expected_success",
     "input_shape": [2, 2],
     "input_values": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
-    "expected_error_contains": "fftshift: only 1-D arrays supported"
+    "expected_shape": [2, 2],
+    "expected_values": [4.0, 3.0, 2.0, 1.0],
+    "abs_tol": 1e-12,
+    "rel_tol": 1e-12
   },
   {
     "id": "hfft_n6_golden",
